<!-- vignettes/hover-popup-demo/_setup.qmd
     Shared setup partial for the hover-popup-demo page set. Included as the
     FIRST body line of every page in this folder (see index.qmd and
     siblings). Re-runs the shared hover-popup infrastructure and the
     original setup chunk on every page, since each page is now an
     independent render target (JohnGavin/llm#778 Phase 2).
-->

{{< include /_includes/hover-popups.qmd >}}

```{r setup}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse  = TRUE,
  comment   = "#>",
  message   = FALSE,
  warning   = FALSE,
  results   = "asis"
)
library(llm)
```
